## What changed

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Contract impact

- [ ] CLI or JSON
- [ ] Manifest, lock, config, artifact, or test YAML
- [ ] Public TypeScript API
- [ ] Adapter, plugin, catalog, audit, or runner behavior
- [ ] No public contract change

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] User-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] No credentials, authentication profiles, private skills, generated `dist/`, or environment files included

Add platform-specific commands, redacted results, and screenshots when relevant.
